<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-error" aria-hidden="true"></span> `error`

Require checked type assertions. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
value := input.(string)
```

## Good

```go
value, ok := input.(string)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only unchecked-type-assertion`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
